**Checklist**
- [ ] Focused on one change
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (`README.md`)
- [ ] No regression of the validated gotchas (`LLM_FREQ_PENALTY=0.0` on Blackwell; OMP thread cap on high-core ARM)
- [ ] I agree to license this under Apache 2.0 (inbound = outbound)
